expected_effect: Lower fee-surface spikiness while preserving or improving mean_edge and calm-slice floors.
expected_failure_signature: Average fees fall too far and arb or weak-slice protection collapses.
expected_win_condition: Lower max_fee_jump while defending incumbent arb and weak-slice floors.
hidden_coupling_removed: Instantaneous event spikes were driving both volatility estimation and fee release timing.
rationale: Use a filtered volatility accumulator plus exponentially decaying protective floor to smooth fee motion without flattening protection.
title: Filtered volatility accumulator floor
why_not_coefficient_retune: This swaps in a filtered volatility accumulator plus decaying floor control instead of retuning the incumbent event-spike coefficients.
